label: Short Interest Contrarian
description: Long the LEAST-shorted quintile (log short-interest cross-sectional rank, ~1,800 stocks/quintile, Compustat). Return leg proxied as FF Mkt+0.3×SMB (least-shorted tilts small). Monthly, 5bps/side.
reference: Boehmer, Jones & Zhang (2008) and the short-interest anomaly literature
